title: SPARQL abs function bug with variables
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_values (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_values (id, value) VALUES (1, -0.234), (2, NULL), (3, 0.0);
SELECT ABS(value) AS absoluteValue FROM test_values WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT ABS(-0.234) AS absoluteFromValue, ABS(COALESCE(value, 0)) AS absoluteValueWithNullHandling FROM test_values;
SELECT ABS(COALESCE(value, 0)) AS absoluteValueWithNullHandling FROM test_values;
key_bug_features: abs() function with variable returns incorrect result
